hook: AI gave you a 47-point action plan when you asked a yes/no question. You're not broken. The AI just doesn't know you.
caption:
AI gave you a 47-point action plan when you asked a yes/no question. You're not broken. The AI just doesn't know you.

Here's what's actually happening:

Some people think in bullet points. Some think in narratives. Some need the conclusion first, then the reasoning. Some need the reasoning first, or they won't trust the conclusion.

AI defaults to "comprehensive" because comprehensive feels safe. It doesn't know that you:
— process information visually, not as walls of text
— make faster decisions with less information, not more
— shut down when something feels like homework

So it buries your answer in paragraph four. Every time.

The fix isn't a better prompt. It's a profile.

When AI knows you're a bottom-line-first thinker who needs one clear recommendation before any context — it leads with that. Always. Without you having to ask.

That's what bootfile.ai builds. A calibrated instruction profile based on how YOUR brain actually moves through information.

Stop re-explaining yourself every single conversation. 👇
